task_completion.description: Open StudioTax 2024 and initiate the return for Julian Rossi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open with 'Julian Rossi' visible in the personal information section or the active return tab.

task_completion.description: Enter the T4 employment income from the provided tax documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4 data entry screen in StudioTax showing an employment income amount of $65,000.

task_completion.description: Enter the gross business revenue on Form T2125.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T2125 (Statement of Business or Professional Activities) in StudioTax showing a gross business revenue of $240,000.

task_completion.description: Allocate the business income between Ontario and Alberta using Form T2203.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T2203 (Provincial and Territorial Taxes for Multiple Jurisdictions) open in StudioTax, showing an allocation of $144,000 to Ontario and $96,000 to Alberta.
The tax installments entry screen or Line 47600 in StudioTax showing $35,000 paid.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the StudioTax title bar showing the file saved as 'julian_rossi.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual StudioTax application windows, menus, and form fields, rather than a terminal, text editor, or script generating the .24t file.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the correct tax forms rather than just typing notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Values like $240,000, $144,000, and $96,000 are visible inside the specific input boxes of the StudioTax forms (T2125, T2203), not in a separate notepad or generic document.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy a pre-existing completed file to the destination.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a progression of screenshots showing the agent actively filling out the forms in StudioTax before saving the final file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Julian Rossi. T4 Employment Income: $65,000. T2125 Gross Business Revenue: $240,000. Form T2203 Interprovincial Allocations: $144,000 to Ontario (ON) and $96,000 to Alberta (AB). Tax Installments (Line 47600): $35,000.
